headlines.title: Blazing Bagels abruptly closes all locations amid bankruptcy
headlines.summary: Blazing Bagels shut down all locations this week, leaving employees surprised after receiving an email Thursday informing them of the bankruptcy. The local chain, operating since 2001, had locations in Seattle's SODO and University District neighborhoods, Redmond and Bellevue.

headlines.title: The West's last aluminum smelter is coming down, taking a way of life with it
headlines.summary: Ferndale's Intalco-Alcoa aluminum smelter, which once employed 700 workers, is being dismantled after 60 years of operation. The closure marks the end of an economic engine that provided good living-wage jobs for generations of workers in the community.

headlines.title: Seattle Mariners unveil 2026 ballpark menu with Pacific Northwest flavors
headlines.summary: The Seattle Mariners unveiled its 2026 ballpark menu featuring over 30 new offerings including local eastern European, Mexican and barbecue restaurants, a Chocolate Mousse Moose, and a take-home Washington state ferry souvenir.

headlines.title: Dick's Drive-In faces class-action lawsuit over unpaid wages and missed breaks
headlines.summary: The popular western Washington burger chain is facing a lawsuit alleging failure to pay overtime, missed 10-minute rest breaks, and failure to provide 30-minute meal breaks as required by Washington state law.

headlines.title: Spring 2026 transit service changes begin March 28 ahead of 2 Line opening
headlines.summary: King County Metro and Sound Transit are implementing service changes on March 28, including Phase 4 of East Link Connections. The Link 2 Line will carry its first passengers across Lake Washington in just 7 days.

headlines.title: West Seattle hosts annual free recycle/reuse/shred event
headlines.summary: West Seattle's annual free recycle/reuse/shred event is happening today at South Seattle College, presented by the West Seattle Chamber of Commerce and West Seattle Junction Association.

headlines.title: University of Washington cherry blossom trees in full bloom
headlines.summary: The iconic cherry blossom trees at the University of Washington Quad are in peak bloom, drawing visitors and photographers to enjoy the spring display.

headlines.title: Hero passenger stops King County bus after driver has medical emergency
headlines.summary: A Seattle man jumped into action to stop a King County Metro bus that crashed into multiple vehicles after the driver suffered a medical emergency.
